request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that our current alliance commitments are actually making us LESS safe? While we're tied down protecting others, we're neglecting our own cyber defenses. A friend in my comp sci class pointed out that we've had 3 major data breaches this year alone while our 'allies' just sit back. Maybe it's time we focus on securing OUR future first. #NationalSecurityFirst #CyberSafetyMatters
